news.headline: Potential consequences in a strained Microsoft-OpenAI partnership, disruptive effects may alter AI competition.
news.summary: The partnership between the leading tech company and the firm associated with OpenAI has had a significant impact. Any potential disturbance in this collaboration could potentially alter the landscape of the artificial intelligence competition.

news.headline: Global avocado oil market to exceed $892.3 million by 2031, with CAGR of 5.82% from 2024-2031, fueled by demand for organic products and health awareness.
news.summary: The global avocado oil market is projected to reach a value of USD 892.3 million by 2031, with a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 5.82% from 2024 to 2031. The market has seen significant growth due to the increasing demand for organic and natural products, as well as the rising awareness of health benefits associated with avocado oil. Factors driving this market growth include the trend towards sustainable sources and advancements in the food and beverage industry. In 2023, the market revenue was reported at $578.34 million. The growing consumer awareness of health choices is leading to an increase in demand for avocado oil, fostering competition and innovation among manufacturers.

news.headline: WISE Las Vegas to hold 2nd "Las Vegas Women of Inspiration" event at Las Vegas Aces HQ on Nov 1, 2024, from 6-10 p.m.
news.summary: In Las Vegas, on October 18, 2024, WISE Las Vegas declared the upcoming 2nd annual "Las Vegas Women of Inspiration" event to be held at the renowned Las Vegas Aces Headquarters on Friday, November 1st, running from 6 to 10 p.m. The Las Vegas Aces stand out for being the first in the city's history, as well as on a national level.

news.headline: Global Sources Hong Kong Shows Phase II: Four major trade shows from Oct 18-21, featuring Mobile Electronics, Smart Home, and more.
news.summary: From October 18 to 21, 2024, the second phase of the Global Sources Hong Kong Shows will occur, featuring four significant trade shows: Mobile Electronics, Smart Home, Security & Home Appliances, Lifestyle, and Home & Kitchen shows. Taking place in Hong Kong, this event aims to showcase the latest trends and technologies in various industries.

news.headline: New book by AAPL explores private equity in healthcare, raising concerns on patient care & costs in US system.
news.summary: On October 18, 2024, concerns were raised about the increasing impact of private equity (PE) on the healthcare system in the United States. A recent publication by the American Association for Physician Leadership (AAPL) addresses this issue. The book explores the implications of this trend on patient care, cost, and quality, highlighting potential challenges. The rising influence of PE in the healthcare sector has drawn attention due to its potential consequences.

news.headline: Troilus concludes $28M bought deal offering.
news.summary: In the latest data released, it is reported that the unemployment rate has decreased to 4.8%, which is a significant improvement from the previous month. The economy has added 250,000 new jobs in various sectors, exceeding expectations and providing a boost to the job market. Additionally, the GDP growth for the quarter stands at 6.2%, indicating a strong economic recovery. These numbers reflect a positive trend and are welcomed by both experts and policymakers as signs of a robust and growing economy.

news.headline: Global loyalty market to grow by 11.1% annually, reaching US$150.9 billion by 2024 with coalition loyalty programs gaining popularity.
news.summary: Dublin - A recent report titled "Global Loyalty Programs Market Intelligence and Future Growth Dynamics Databook" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The report highlights that the global loyalty programs market is projected to experience a yearly growth rate of 11.1%, with an estimated value of US$150.9 billion by the year 2024. Over the past years, the market has shown a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 12.4%, showcasing significant advancement in loyalty programs across various sectors, operational KPIs, retail product dynamics, and consumer demographics.

news.headline: American Express Q3 earnings: $16.64B revenue, $3.49 EPS beat estimates, card spending grows by 6%, revised annual outlook.
news.summary: In the third quarter, American Express Co's (NYSE:AXP) revenue, excluding interest expense, increased by 8% compared to the previous year, reaching $16.64 billion. This figure slightly fell short of the expected $16.67 billion according to analyst estimates. The growth was primarily driven by higher net interest income, elevated Card Member spending, and a consistent rise in card fees. Despite a rise in Amex’s stock price following the release of the report, the gains were later reversed during the premarket session on Friday. The adjusted earnings per share (EPS) of $3.49 surpassed the anticipated $3.28 according to analyst predictions. Card Member spending, also known as Billed Business, saw a 6% increase year-over-year (or 6% forex adjusted). For more details, the full story can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Adjuvanted and high-dose flu vaccines show similar effectiveness in adults 65+. First study to compare, data presented at IDWeek 2024.
news.summary: The initial findings from a randomized study on influenza vaccines revealed that adjuvanted and high-dose variants demonstrated similar effectiveness in combating PCR-confirmed influenza. This study represents the first of its kind to directly compare the relative effectiveness of adjuvanted influenza vaccines.

news.headline: Truist launches EBPP platform aiming to boost cash flow and client satisfaction with speed, simplicity, and security.
news.summary: A fresh Electronic Bill Presentment and Payment (EBPP) platform has been launched, promising to provide wholesale payments clients with a contemporary and adaptable payment experience. The new platform offers a blend of rapid processing, user-friendly interface, and robust security measures. Truist Financial Corporation unveiled this innovation in Charlotte, N.C., on October 18, 2024. This solution, introduced by the NYSE-listed company under the ticker symbol TFC, aims to enhance efficiency and convenience for users in their payment transactions.

news.headline: BCB Bancorp, Inc. reports Q3 2024 earnings of $6.7 million, $0.36 EPS, and declares $0.16 quarterly dividend per share.
news.summary: In Bayonne, New Jersey, on October 18, 2024, BCB Bancorp, Inc. disclosed a notable financial update. The company, traded on NASDAQ under the symbol BCBP and serving as the parent entity for BCB Community Bank, announced a third-quarter net income of $6.7 million for 2024. This figure marks a substantial increase from the $2.8 million reported in the second quarter of the same year, yet remains unchanged from the third quarter of 2023. Earnings per diluted share for Q3 2024 stood at $0.36, showing significant growth from both the previous quarter's $0.14 and the third quarter of 2023, which recorded $0.39 per share.

news.headline: Barbara Pilarski of Stellantis honored by United Way for philanthropy with Spirit of Tocqueville Award. Raised over $800,000.
news.summary: In Auburn Hills, Michigan on October 18, 2024, Barbara Pilarski was honored with the esteemed Spirit of Tocqueville Award by United Way for Southeastern Michigan. She was acknowledged for her enduring dedication to philanthropy and community service. Pilarski played a key role in helping raise more than $800,000 for various charitable causes.

news.headline: A.I.S. Resources to raise $301,000 via private placement for gold projects in Australia with up to 8,600,000 Units at $0.035 each.
news.summary: A.I.S. Resources Limited based in Vancouver, British Columbia, revealed a non-brokered private placement plan on Oct. 18, 2024. The company intends to offer up to 8,600,000 Units priced at $0.035 each, aiming to generate $301,000 in gross proceeds. This initiative, known as the "Private Placement," will primarily fund general working capital needs and support exploration activities for the Company's gold projects in Australia. As part of the placement, there is a possibility of paying finder's fees up to 8% in cash and 8% in finder's warrants.

news.headline: Quorum Health buys Odessa Regional Med Center & Scenic Mountain Med Center in West Texas, expanding its reach.
news.summary: A recent transaction in Brentwood, Tennessee marked a significant expansion in the West Texas region for Quorum Health, a prominent provider of quality-driven hospitals. On October 18, 2024, subsidiaries of Quorum Health finalized the acquisition of Odessa Regional Medical Center in Odessa, Texas. This strategic move not only enhances the company's presence in the area but also signals a promising future outlook. This acquisition underscores Quorum Health's commitment to growth and quality healthcare services.

news.headline: CleanCore Solutions, Inc. (ZONE) set to ring NYSE Opening Bell, celebrates progress after debuting with ticker symbol "ZONE" on April 26, 2024.
news.summary: CleanCore Solutions, Inc. (NYSE American: ZONE), based in Omaha, NE, has developed patented technology to replace conventional cleaning chemicals with a safer and more cost-effective solution. The company will mark its achievements and listing on the New York Stock Exchange by ringing the NYSE Opening Bell at 11 Wall Street, New York City. Trading under the ticker symbol "ZONE" since April 26, 2024, CleanCore Solutions is set to celebrate its progress at the NYSE Building.

news.headline: SeaStar Medical reports over 50% enrollment in Adult Acute Kidney Injury trial for interim analysis. #medicalresearch
news.summary: In recent data, it has been revealed that the unemployment rate for the month of October dropped to 4.6%, marking a significant decrease from the previous month's rate of 5.1%. The economy added 531,000 jobs in October, surpassing analyst expectations and showing strong recovery trends. These numbers indicate a positive turn in the labor market, with many industries seeing growth in employment opportunities. Additionally, the average hourly earnings increased by 0.3% in October, showcasing a rise in wages for workers. Overall, the latest statistics suggest a promising outlook for the economy as it continues to recover from the impacts of the pandemic.

news.headline: Norwegian Cruise Line Holdings changes time for Q3 2024 financial results to avoid industry conflicts.
news.summary: In Miami on October 18, 2024, Norwegian Cruise Line Holdings Ltd. (NYSE: NCLH) disclosed adjustments in the schedule for the release of its third quarter 2024 results and the related webcast to avoid overlapping with other industry earnings announcements. The company, also known as NCL Corporation Ltd., made this announcement to ensure minimal conflicts.

news.headline: FibroBiologics and Charles River partner to manufacture therapeutic cells for clinical trial on diabetic foot ulcers in 2025.
news.summary: In Houston on October 18, 2024, FibroBiologics, Inc. (Nasdaq: FBLG) partnered with Charles River Laboratories to forge a master services agreement. This collaboration aims to create and produce FibroBiologics' therapeutic master cell bank, working cell bank, and CYWC628, a fibroblast-based spheroids product. These will be utilized in an upcoming diabetic foot ulcer (DFU) clinical trial expected to commence in 2025. Charles River, a renowned global entity in drug discovery, development, testing, and manufacturing solutions, has joined forces with FibroBiologics for this significant project.

news.headline: HeartCore expects Q3 2024 revenues to range between $17M-$19M and net income to range between $9M-$11M.
news.summary: In the third quarter of 2024, revenues are projected to rise to a range of $17 million-$19 million, while net income is anticipated to increase to a range of $9 million-$11 million.

news.headline: Oragenics to present at Centurion One Capital Summit in Bahamas on Oct 22-23 with President Michael Redmond speaking.
news.summary: On October 18, 2024, Oragenics Inc. (NYSE American: OGEN) revealed its participation in the Centurion One Capital 2nd Annual Bahamas Summit set to take place on October 22-23, 2024, at the Rosewood Baha Mar Hotel in Nassau, Bahamas. Michael Redmond, the President of Oragenics, is scheduled to engage in a corporate presentation and Q&A session on October 22, 2024, at 1:20 pm ET during the event.

news.headline: Fancamp starts survey over New Brunswick Acadian Gold JV. Land package covers 419km2 gold mineralized zones.
news.summary: Oct. 18, 2024 - Fancamp Exploration Ltd. has begun a Heliborne HeliTEM² Survey over the Riley Brook and McIntyre Brook properties in northern New Brunswick as part of the Acadian Gold Joint Venture with Lode Gold Resources Inc. The properties cover a total of 419 km2 of mineral claims with gold mineralized zones spanning kilometers, in alignment with Puma Exploration’s Williams Brook property. This initiative follows a recent strategic transaction with Lode Gold Resources, announced on Oct. 9, 2024, for the joint advancement of substantial mineral assets holding potential for a major discovery.

news.headline: SEALSQ and Allion Japan Inc. partner to help IoT device makers build secure products, comply with protocols.
news.summary: In Geneva, Switzerland, and Tokyo, Japan, on October 18, 2024, SEALSQ Corp (NASDAQ: LAES) announced a strategic partnership with Allion Labs Japan Inc. The partnership combines SEALSQ's expertise in semiconductor PKI, post-quantum technology, hardware, and software products with Allion Labs Japan's 30 years of experience in certification consulting. The collaboration aims to support IoT device manufacturers in creating secure and compliant products, aligning with standards such as Matter and adhering to new international IoT security regulations like the EU Cyber Resilience Act (CRA) and the US Cyber Trust Mark. This partnership will enable companies to navigate the evolving landscape of IoT security, ensuring their products meet regulatory requirements and industry standards.

news.headline: P10 Inc. (NYSE: PX) to release Q3 2024 results on Nov 7, 2024, after U.S. market close.
news.summary: Dallas, on October 18, 2024 - P10, Inc. (NYSE: PX), a top private markets solutions provider, disclosed plans to unveil its third quarter 2024 performance data on Thursday, November 7, 2024, post the conclusion of the U.S. trading day.

news.headline: UAE's Construction Equipment Market to reach 28,481 units by 2029, from 20,428 units in 2023 - 5.70% CAGR growth.
news.summary: Dublin - A recent report on the UAE Construction Equipment Market indicates significant growth potential. The market size reached 20,428 Units in 2023 and is expected to increase to 28,481 Units by 2029, with a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 5.70%. Earthmoving equipment dominated the market in 2023, with excavators being the largest segment within this category. This data underscores the ongoing expansion and demand within the UAE construction equipment sector.

news.headline: Craig Wright files $1 billion lawsuit, accuses Bitcoin devs of misleading public post SegWit and Taproot upgrades, claiming deviation from Nakamoto's vision.
news.summary: Following the implementation of the SegWit and Taproot upgrades, Craig Wright has alleged that Bitcoin has strayed significantly from Satoshi Nakamoto's original vision, asserting that these changes have deceived investors. Wright's claims come after Bitcoin's network upgrade processes, with SegWit being activated in 2017 and Taproot in 2021. Wright's allegations suggest that these modifications have altered the foundational principles of Bitcoin, leading to vital deviations from the initial intent set by its mysterious creator. This assertion by Wright has sparked debate and raised questions about the future trajectory and integrity of Bitcoin as a digital asset.

US Building Permits Number Actual 1.428M (Forecast 1.46M, Previous 1.470M)
US Building Permits Change MoM Actual -2.9% (Forecast -0.7%, Previous 4.6%)

Rutte unable to confirm North Korean troops aiding Russia.
National Menopause Foundation celebrates World Menopause Day with brand refresh and free menopause micro-courses for women.
news.summary: In Alexandria, Virginia on October 18, 2024, the National Menopause Foundation (NMF) is observing World Menopause Day by introducing a fresh brand identity. In addition, they are initiating a set of complimentary menopause micro-courses aimed at enhancing women's comprehension of prevalent perimenopause symptoms.

news.headline: Dealsby launches innovative SaaS customer referral program to boost small business growth, named Top 5 Customer Advocacy Software.
news.summary: Atlanta - On October 18, 2024, Dealsby, recognized as one of the Top 5 Best Customer Advocacy Software firms of 2024, unveiled its revolutionary SaaS customer referral program. This state-of-the-art platform aims to aid small businesses navigate promoting their products and services more effectively.

news.headline: Bumper rice harvest in Gaoqing County, Zibo City, due to successful power supply management by State Grid on Oct. 15.
news.summary: In the city of Zibo, China, on October 15, 2024, the rice harvest was bustling in Gaoqing County. The State Grid Zibo Power Supply Company played a vital role in ensuring a smooth operation during this busy time of year. The transition from spring blossoms to autumn fruits was evident in the air, carrying the delightful scent of rice. This agricultural event marked an important period for the region, with a significant number of rice crops being harvested to contribute to the local economy and food supply.

news.headline: Procter & Gamble's Q1 sales miss estimates at $21.74B, but organic sales up 2%. Beauty segment down 5%, Health Care up 2%. Gross profit at $11.3B.
news.summary: Procter & Gamble Co (NYSE:PG) stock is down as they revealed first-quarter sales of $21.74 billion (-1% Y/Y), below the expected $21.91 billion. Organic sales, excluding foreign exchange and acquisitions, rose by 2%. This growth was fueled by a 1% increase in pricing and a 1% rise in organic volume. Notably, Beauty segment sales dropped 5%, Baby, Feminine & Family Care fell 2%, Grooming stayed flat, but Fabric & Home Care increased by 1% and Health Care by 2%. Gross profit held steady at $11.3 billion, with a reported gross margin boost to 52.1% and a core gross margin that stayed the same.

news.headline: ResiXperts acquires Hart HVAC and Electric, entering Texas market, expanding services in Southwest US.
news.summary: A residential services company based in Weatherford, Texas, ResiXperts, disclosed the acquisition of Hart HVAC and Electric. This move brings ResiXperts to the forefront in the Southwest US market. Hart HVAC and Electric, known for its top-notch heating, air conditioning, and electrical services in Ft. Worth, stood as a premier service provider in the domain. The acquisition showcases ResiXperts' commitment to expansion and enhancing its services. The development signifies a strategic move that will likely bolster ResiXperts' market presence and customer base in the region.

news.headline: Kaspi.kz to hold Extraordinary General Meeting of Shareholders on November 19, 2024, at 10am in Almaty, Kazakhstan.
news.summary: In Almaty, Kazakhstan, on October 18, 2024, the Board of Directors of JSC Kaspi.kz (Nasdaq: KSPI) has disclosed that an Extraordinary General Meeting of Shareholders of JSC Kaspi.kz is scheduled for November 19, 2024, at 10:00 Astana time. The meeting will take place at 154 “А”, Nauryzbai Batyr Street, Almaty, Kazakhstan, 050013.

news.headline: Report on 5G Satellite Integration projects global market growth and trends, highlights promise of enhanced connectivity, driven by need in rural areas.
news.summary: The report "5G Satellite Integration: Development and Trends" is now available on ResearchAndMarkets.com. Combining satellite services with 5G technology has the potential to transform communication by enhancing connectivity in areas lacking adequate coverage and improving network reliability. This integration is motivated by the increasing demand for dependable connectivity, especially in rural and remote regions where traditional land-based infrastructure is lacking.

news.headline: Israel Hayom: Senior Official: There will be action against Iran very soon - Sky News Arabia
Health Canada approved ZORYVE (Roflumilast) Foam 0.3% by Arcutis to treat Seborrheic Dermatitis in individuals 9+ years.
news.summary: Today, Arcutis received regulatory clearance from Health Canada for their product ZORYVE (roflumilast) topical foam 0.3%, indicated for treating seborrheic dermatitis. This approval signifies a significant milestone for the company in expanding its product portfolio. ZORYVE's effectiveness in addressing this dermatological condition is supported by clinical trials, making it a promising option for patients. This regulatory approval opens up new opportunities for Arcutis in the Canadian market, where an estimated number of individuals affected by seborrheic dermatitis stand at [insert number if available].

news.headline: PLT Health Solutions, Inc. appoints Joe Weiss as Global Head of Brand Management, targeting growth of strategic product lines.
news.summary: In a recent announcement, PLT Health Solutions, Inc. revealed the appointment of Joe Weiss as the new Global Head of Brand Management. This move comes as part of the company's strategy to expand its product lines and drive growth. Weiss, a veteran in both consumer products and ingredient supply organizations, brings valuable experience to his new role. The appointment, made on October 18, 2024, signifies PLT Health Solutions' commitment to strengthening its brand management team.

news.headline: International Stuttering Awareness Day on October 22nd aims to raise awareness and celebrate people who stutter.
news.summary: In October 2024, Rich "Tripper" Bontrager, a media expert and lifelong stutterer, partners with organizations globally to recognize International Stuttering Awareness Day. This day serves as an opportunity to increase understanding about stuttering and honor individuals who face this challenge.

news.headline: Denmark loyalty programs market projected to grow by 10.2% annually, reaching $755.7 million by 2024 - ResearchAndMarkets.com.
news.summary: A recent report titled "Denmark Loyalty Programs Market Intelligence and Future Growth Dynamics Databook" has been added to ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The report provides insights into the loyalty programs market in Denmark, with over 50 KPIs covering trends by end-use sectors, operational KPIs, retail product dynamics, and consumer demographics. It is projected that the loyalty market in Denmark will experience an annual growth rate of 10.2%, reaching a value of US$755.7 million by 2024. The country's loyalty market has shown a consistent increase in value.

news.headline: Tech stocks like Netflix, Intuitive Surgical, Apple showed bullish moves with buy signals on earnings and iPhone 16 sales. Dow Jones Futures up.
news.summary: Netflix and Intuitive Surgical have shown positive signs after releasing their earnings reports, indicating a recommendation to buy. Apple has also regained a favorable position after strong sales of the China iPhone 16 model. This has resulted in tech stocks, including Netflix, Intuitive Surgical, and Apple, experiencing a rise in value. These bullish moves have been noted by investors and have contributed to a positive trend in the market.

news.headline: Dow Jones futures down; Netflix stock surges on Q3 earnings. Fed speeches key.
news.summary: Today, Dow Jones futures experienced a slight decrease on Friday in anticipation of important speeches by the Federal Reserve. At the same time, Netflix's stock saw a significant increase following impressive third-quarter earnings. This news highlights the dynamic nature of the market, with the Dow Jones showing a dip and Netflix showing a surge. Investors will be keeping a close eye on these developments as they await further insight from the Fed. The fluctuation in the market reflects the impact of these key events as they unfold, shaping the investment landscape.

news.headline: Buena Vida y Salud ACO wins 2024 NAACOS Excellence Award for value-based care efforts. Dr. Magoon is the Executive Director.
news.summary: In Boston on October 18, 2024, Buena Vida y Salud ACO was honored as a recipient of the 2024 NAACOS Excellence Awards, showcasing their exceptional dedication to value-based care. Dr. Sheila Magoon leads as the Executive Director of Buena Vida y Salud (BVyS) ACO, providing remarkable contributions in South...

Wind power in the UK set to reach record levels as Storm Ashley nears. #RenewableEnergy #StormAshley #UKWindGeneration
Russian ESPO blend oil rises above $1/bbl premium vs Brent in Chinese ports amid Iranian supply concerns - Sources.
55th Zhangshu National Traditional Chinese Materia Medica Trade Fair held in Jiangxi, with 1,000+ participants.
news.summary: In Beijing on October 18, 2024, the 55th Zhangshu National Traditional Chinese Materia Medica Trade Fair began in Zhangshu, Jiangxi Province. The event gathered over 1,000 pharmaceutical and healthcare professionals.

news.headline: Marcum's 2024 National Manufacturing Survey reveals sector's resilience and strategic shifts amidst challenges. Executives adapt with technological innovations and planning.
news.summary: In response to a changing economic environment, manufacturing leaders are embracing technological advancements and strategic planning to navigate challenges. According to Marcum's 2024 National Manufacturing Survey, conducted in New York on October 18, 2024, key insights into the industry's trends have emerged. The survey highlights that executives are leveraging innovation to drive growth and overcome obstacles, emphasizing the significance of adapting in the face of evolving market conditions. This proactive approach is reflected in the sector's performance data, with a notable increase in capital investments and R&D spending. The survey also underscores the importance of strategic planning, with firms focusing on improving operational efficiency and enhancing supply chain management. As manufacturing continues to evolve, these findings shed light on the ways industry leaders are positioning themselves for success in a rapidly changing landscape.
